features: 1 Way Socket: The extension lead is perfect for using when you only have one appliance that need to power, such as monitor, laptop, printer, coffee machine and so on. ideal for using in your home, offices or even outside in your garden with waterproof box if you need the power.

Lightweight Design: The compact and lightweight design allows you transport your extension cord around the house or office, also being able to place it behind your desk or on the floor which saves space and doesn't get in the way.

25 Metre Length: This extension lead features with a 25M length cable, ideal for extend the length for other extension lead which the cable is not long enough to charging multiple appliances from distance in a large office or room.

Children Protection: Built-in children-care clip can bring less heat and power resistance, which protect kids from unexpected electric shock if children insert their fingers into the plug sockets. Anti-thunder protection ensure more safety for household electric appliances, offering an extra safety and a peaceful mind while charging.
What You Get: EXTRASTAR 1 way 25M UK 3Pin plug extension lead and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us.
